zh.lifeSummary: 當Malyn Oxenbridge於1473年出生在英國素可布雷德時，她的父親Robert Oxenbridge46歲，母親Anne Lyvelode42歲。她與Sir Richard Carew of Beddington結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1544年10月3日在英國素瑞貝丁頓享年71歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素瑞貝丁頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Malyn Oxenbridge于1473年出生在英国素可布雷德时，她的父亲Robert Oxenbridge46岁，母亲Anne Lyvelode42岁。她与Sir Richard Carew of Beddington结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1544年10月3日在英国素瑞貝丁頓享年71岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素瑞貝丁頓。

nameMeanings.name: Malyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern variant of Madeleine , influenced by the productive suffix -lyn; see Lynn .

variants.name: Madeleine
meanings: The French form of the byname of a character in the New Testament, Mary Magdalene ‘Mary of Magdala’. Magdala was a village on Lake Galilee, a few miles north of Tiberias. The woman ‘which had been healed of evil spirits and infirmities’ (Luke 8:2) was given this name in the Bible to distinguish her from other bearers of the very common name Mary . It was widely accepted in Christian folk belief that she was the same person as the repentant sinner who washed Christ's feet with her tears in the previous chapter (Luke 7), but there is no support in the text for this identification.

en.lifeSummary: When Malyn Oxenbridge was born in 1473, in Brede, Sussex, England, her father, Robert Oxenbridge, was 46 and her mother, Anne Lyvelode, was 42. She married Sir Richard Carew of Beddington. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 3 October 1544, in Beddington, Surrey, England, at the age of 71, and was buried in Beddington, Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Malyn Oxenbridge est née en 1473, à Brede, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Robert Oxenbridge, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Anne Lyvelode, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Carew of Beddington. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 octobre 1544, à Beddington, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Beddington, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Malyn Oxenbridge 1473 in Brede, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Oxenbridge 46 und ihre Mutter Anne Lyvelode 42. Sie hat Sir Richard Carew of Beddington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Oktober 1544 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Beddington, Surrey, England und wurde in Beddington, Surrey, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Malyn Oxenbridge è nata il nel 1473 nel Brede, Sussex, England, sua padre, Robert Oxenbridge, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Anne Lyvelode, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard Carew of Beddington. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 3 ottobre 1544, nel Beddington, Surrey, England, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolta a Beddington, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Malyn Oxenbridgeが1473年にイギリススセックスブレドで生まれた時，父Robert Oxenbridgeは46歳，母Anne Lyvelodeは42歳であった。Sir Richard Carew of Beddingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1544年10月3日にイギリススリーベッドイントンで71歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススリーベッドイントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Malyn Oxenbridge(이)가 1473년 영국 수세스 브레드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Oxenbridge(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Lyvelode(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 Sir Richard Carew of Beddington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1544년 10월 3일 영국 수리 베딩턴에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수리 베딩턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Malyn Oxenbridge nasceu em 1473, em Brede, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Oxenbridge, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Anne Lyvelode, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Carew of Beddington. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de outubro de 1544, em Beddington, Surrey, Inglaterra, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em Beddington, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Malyn Oxenbridge родилась в 1473 г. в местности бред, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Oxenbridge было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Lyvelode, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Carew of Beddington. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 3 октября 1544 г. в местности беддингтон, сурри, Англия в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности беддингтон, сурри, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Malyn Oxenbridge nació en 1473, en Brede, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Oxenbridge, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Anne Lyvelode, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Sir Richard Carew of Beddington. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 3 de octubre de 1544, en Beddington, Surrey, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultada en Beddington, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
